title: Erdős–Gyárfás Conjecture
next_action: Attempt the collision-wall lemma (G012): for every finite voltage group Gamma and every connected minimum-degree-3 base, every assignment admits an identity-voltage tailless non-backtracking closed walk of length 2^k for every 2^k >= C*log2|Gamma| + C_B, via composition of same-voltage non-backtracking walk pairs; only the first/last-arc diversity bookkeeping is open (A009 records the construction, the matching E008 data, and why coset confinement cannot dodge). Success closes G012 and hands G007 its quantitative core; a value-confinement counterexample family would reopen construction with a new lever. Deferred alternative: the proof-side controlled-start consecutive-even-lengths lemma. Census layer complete at its cap (order 18 empty, L022).
